name: Dry Pineapple Slice
steps: Slice the pineapple with the skin with the ham-slicer at 1.5mm.
Dice the slices in the syrup.
Remove all the bits from on the slices and put them on a cling filmed and greased dehydrator tray.
Dry for 4 hours at 50°C then flip the slices and place a plastic dehydrator sheet on top and dehydrate till fully dry.
Store flat in a plastic box with silica-gel. (Label 5 days)
